text:
Australia/Sydney is UTC+10 in December (no DST in 1938).  
Europe/Paris is UTC+0 in winter 1938 (no DST).  
Time difference: Sydney is 10 hours ahead of UTC, Paris is 0 hours ahead of UTC → Sydney is 10 hours ahead of Paris.  
1 PM Sydney = 03:00 UTC = 03:00 Paris time.  
Date: December 28, 1938 (same day).  

FINAL_ANSWER: 1938-12-28 03:00
